name: phemex-futures-positions
title: Phemex Futures Positions
description: View your open futures positions and account balance on Phemex exchange
author: alorse

commands.name: see-open-positions
commands.title: Phemex Positions
commands.description: View your open futures positions and PNL

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
